prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含2021–2023年理科）最低位次分别为约6427名、7025名、5420名、6909名、6313名，整体波动较大，近3年呈先升后降再升的震荡走势；20 25年基准位次约6313名；该校在贵州省物理类招生计划2021年69人、2022年69人、2023年68人、2024年66人、2025年64人，呈逐年小幅缩减趋势；2026年 计划大幅扩招至90人，较2025年增加约40.6%，扩招幅度显著，对竞争格局有较大影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京科技大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第 35名，近年排名稳定在第33–36名区间，属于顶尖211院校，工科实力突出；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，涉及伪造成绩单和抄袭学位论文事件，对报考心理有一定 负面影响；但抖音综合热度总排名第1（高热），短视频曝光量极大，毕业典礼撑伞等暖心视频广泛传播，整体关注度极高；未见明显投档断档记录；冶金工程A +、材料科学与工程A+、科学技术史A+、环境科学与工程A-，材料、冶金等王牌学科与物理类招生专业（材料科学与工程、冶金工程、矿业类等）高度对应，学科实力强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 北京科技大学位于北京市，一线城市地域优势明显，对西南地区考生有较强吸引力；该 校在贵州招生占比较小（约64–90人），属于跨省招生，地域偏好因素影响有限；计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，与该校计算机类、通信工程、自动化类等招生专业匹配，吸引高分考生；材料科学与工程属生化 环材大类整体劝退，但该校材料学科为A+顶级，报考热度分化。贵州省2026年高考总人数约299000人，较2025年（约297258人）略有增加；物理类考生2025年约207171人，2026年 按历史比例估算约206310人，基本持平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次6313名、2026年大幅扩招约40.6%带来的竞争加剧、学校顶 尖211层次和北京地域优势对考生的持续吸引力、抖音高热关注度以及声誉偏负面的有限影响，预计2026年物理类最低位次将较2025年明显后移；预测最低位次约7702名，区间720 2–8202名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science Category from 2021 to 2023) were approximately 6427, 7025, 5420, 6909, and 6313 respectively, showing significant fluctuations with an oscillating trend of first rising, then falling, then rising in the recent three years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 6313. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guizhou Province was 69 in 2021, 69 in 2022, 68 in 2023, 66 in 2024, and 64 in 2025, showing a gradual slight reduction year by year; in 2026, the plan significantly expands to 90, an increase of about 40.6% compared to 2025, which has a substantial impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: University of Science and Technology Beijing is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked 35th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 33–36 range in recent years, belonging to top-tier 211 universities with outstanding engineering strength; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative, involving incidents of forged transcripts and plagiarized degree theses, which have a certain negative impact on application psychology; however, the overall Douyin popularity ranking is 1st (high heat), with massive short video exposure, and heartwarming videos such as graduation ceremony umbrella-holding widely spread, resulting in extremely high overall attention; no obvious enrollment gaps or interruptions have been recorded; Metallurgical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, History of Science and Technology A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, with top disciplines such as Materials and Metallurgy highly corresponding to Physics Category enrollment majors (Materials Science and Engineering, Metallurgical Engineering, Mining Category, etc.), demonstrating strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: University of Science and Technology Beijing is located in Beijing, with obvious regional advantages as a first-tier city, strongly attracting candidates from the southwestern region; the university's enrollment proportion in Guizhou is relatively small (about 64–90 people), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with limited influence from regional preference factors; majors such as Computer Category, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, matching the university's enrollment majors like Computer Category, Communication Engineering, and Automation Category, attracting high-scoring candidates; Materials Science and Engineering belongs to the broadly discouraged Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials categories, but the university's Materials discipline is A+ top-level, leading to divergent application popularity. The total number of Gaokao candidates in Guizhou Province in 2026 is approximately 299,000, slightly increased from 2025 (approximately 297,258); Physics Category candidates in 2025 were approximately 207,171, and in 2026, estimated by historical proportion, approximately 206,310, basically unchanged.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 6313 in 2025, the intensified competition due to a significant enrollment expansion of about 40.6% in 2026, the sustained attraction of the university's top 211 level and Beijing regional advantages to candidates, the high Douyin popularity, and the limited negative impact of reputation, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will significantly shift backward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 7702, with a range of 7202–8202.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 7202–8202, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, sprint for Tier 1 top majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 7202) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Science Experimental Class and Computer Category; candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (around 7500) should mainly consider Tier 2 majors such as Automation Category, Communication Engineering, and Mathematics Category; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (8202) are advised to use Tier 3 top majors such as Materials Science and Engineering (A+) and Metallurgical Engineering (A+) as safety options, offering extremely high cost-effectiveness.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2024–2025年历史类最低位次分别为约2207名、2091名，两年数据呈小幅前移趋势（竞争略加剧），2025年基准位次约2091名；该校在贵州省历 史类招生计划2024年6人、2025年8人，呈扩招趋势；2026年计划继续扩招至10人，较2025年增加25%，扩招幅度明显，对位次有下行压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京科技大学 为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科排名第35名，以工科见长，文科专业规模较小，但学校整体层次高，对文科考生仍有吸引力；2026年声誉评价为偏负面（学 术不端事件），但抖音综合热度总排名第1（高热），整体关注度极高；未见文科相关投档异常记录；该校文科相关学科未获A类评级，但社会科学试验班（含法 学、行政管理等）依托学校整体平台，工商管理类（数智管理试验班）对应工商管理学科（未单独评级）。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业热度分化观望但整体偏热，与社会科 学试验班中的法学方向对应；外国语言文学类属外语大类，一般观望；工商管理类属商科，分化观望。贵州省2026年历史类考生按比例估算约92690人，较2025年（90087人）略有 增加，竞争略有加剧；北京科技大学位于北京市，一线城市对文科考生有较强吸引力；该校在贵州历史类招生仅6–10人，属于极 小规模招生，位次波动受个别高分考生影响较大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2091名、2026年扩招25%带来的竞争缓解、学校211层次和北京地域优势的持续吸引力、抖 音高热关注度以及历史类考生规模略有增加，预计2026年历史类最低位次将较2025年小幅后移；预测最低位次约2375名，区间2019–2731名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum rankings for History Category in 2024–2025 were approximately 2207 and 2091 respectively, showing a slight upward trend over two years (slightly intensified competition). The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 2091. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guizhou Province was 6 students in 2024 and 8 students in 2025, showing an expansion trend. The 2026 plan continues to expand to 10 students, a 25% increase from 2025, with a significant expansion rate, exerting downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: University of Science and Technology Beijing is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranked 35th in the Soft Science Ranking. It is known for engineering, with a relatively small scale of liberal arts programs, but the overall high level of the university still attracts liberal arts candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (academic misconduct incident), but the overall Douyin comprehensive popularity ranks first (high heat), with extremely high overall attention. No abnormal records related to liberal arts admissions have been observed. The university's liberal arts-related disciplines have not received A-level ratings, but the Social Science Experimental Class (including Law, Administrative Management, etc.) relies on the university's overall platform, and the Business Administration Class (Digital Intelligence Management Experimental Class) corresponds to the Business Administration discipline (not separately rated).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of the Law major is polarized but generally hot, corresponding to the Law direction in the Social Science Experimental Class. Foreign Language and Literature majors belong to the foreign language category, generally wait-and-see. Business Administration majors belong to the business category, polarized wait-and-see. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category candidates in Guizhou Province is about 92,690, a slight increase from 2025 (90,087), leading to slightly intensified competition. University of Science and Technology Beijing is located in Beijing, a first-tier city that strongly attracts liberal arts candidates. The university's enrollment in Guizhou for History Category is only 6–10 students, a very small-scale enrollment, making ranking fluctuations significantly affected by individual high-scoring candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2091, the 25% enrollment expansion in 2026 easing competition, the sustained attraction of the university's 211 level and Beijing location advantage, the high Douyin popularity, and the slight increase in the number of History Category candidates, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2375, with a range of 2019–2731.
